description: FANOS algebra known-answer tests (spec Part II, §6.3). Pinned by the Rust test suite.

pg_parameters.comment: N = q^2 + q + 1 points = lines; q+1 points per line; |PGL(3,q)| symmetries.

cross_product.comment: Over GF(7): join of two points is their cross product; bridge is the meet of two lines. Canonical form scales the first non-zero coordinate to 1.

fano.comment: The base cell PG(2,2). Point/line index i has GF(2) coordinates point_coords[i]; line_points[l] are the three point indices on line l (self-dual: also the lines through point l).

mediator_examples.comment: k*(i,j) = third point of the line through i,j = XOR of their coordinates.

syndrome.comment: DIAKRISIS 3-bit fault localization (V13). A single degraded node produces the LSB-first binary of its address; the seven UHM sectors A..U carry addresses 1..7.

hierarchy.comment: Scale by a recursion of cells: total = N^k, per-node routing state ~ k*N (V4).
